Description: [Dino Wave Battles reward tiers] Deliberately kept in its OWN file, separate from the scoring/rule patches in PatchDataMod_Event_DinosInvadeManhattan.json, so the reward ITEMS can be swapped later without touching event logic. Same tier structure as LukeCageEvent.prototype (Position=1, Within10/50/90Percent, Over90Percent) but with the operator's own item choices: 1st=AvengersMysteryBox, Top10%=RandomCostumeBox (MissionItems/SpecialRewards variant), Top50%=LoginFortuneCardBox, Top90%/Over90%=AvengersDailyGift (mirrors LukeCageEvent's own pattern of reusing the same item for both the Within90Percent and Over90Percent tiers). ParentDataRef values are the LeaderboardRewardEntryPosition.defaults (13336755512767289921) and LeaderboardRewardEntryPercentile.defaults (619897566873983735) blueprint refs - required by PatchEntryConverter.ParseJsonPrototype to know which reward-entry subtype to allocate

[Dino Wave Battles reward tiers] DISABLED deliberately - CivilWarProReg and CivilWarAntiReg score identically (every kill fires on both, see PatchDataMod_Event_DinosInvadeManhattan.json), so a player finishing e.g. #1 would rank #1 on BOTH boards. Rewarding both would double-pay the same performance. Only CivilWarProReg's Rewards entry above is enabled - this one stays disabled unless the operator wants a genuine two-way split later
